allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'BEES Automacao' | Get-ScheduledTaskInfo | Format-List *; \(Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'BEES Automacao'\).Actions | Format-List *; \(Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'BEES Automacao'\).Triggers | Format-List *")

Bash("G:/Meu Drive/automacao_bees/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c " with open\('G:/Meu Drive/automacao_bees/dashboard/flask_bees.log', 'rb'\) as f: print\(f.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\) ")

Bash("G:/Meu Drive/automacao_bees/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c " import sys with open\('G:/Meu Drive/automacao_bees/dashboard/flask_bees.log', 'rb'\) as f: for line in f.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\).splitlines\(\): if any\(k in line for k in ['armazenado','retornou','Erro ao coletar','detalh','pedidos ativos','Traceback','TimeoutException','Exception']\): sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\(line+'\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\) ")

Bash("G:/Meu Drive/automacao_bees/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c " with open\('G:/Meu Drive/automacao_bees/dashboard/flask_bees.log', 'rb'\) as f: lines = f.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\).splitlines\(\) for l in lines: print\(l\) ")

Bash("G:/Meu Drive/automacao_bees/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{k}: estado={v[\\"estado\\"]} | coletando={v[\\"coletando\\"]} | ultima={v.get\(\\"ultima_atualizacao\\"\)} | erro={v.get\(\\"erro\\",\\"\\"\)[:80] if v.get\(\\"erro\\"\) else None}'\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
